description:
You are the IT Security & Compliance Manager. Rocket.Chat is open at the login screen in the browser. Log in with username: admin and password: Admin1234! -- you need full administrator access for this task.

An internal compliance audit has identified critical policy violations in this workspace requiring immediate remediation.

Review the audit findings in #compliance-audit-findings for the complete list of violations and required actions. Cross-reference with #it-security-policy for exact policy requirements, configuration thresholds, and any required text content. Consult #hr-operations for the current organizational structure and department assignments.

Remediate all findings. The violations span channel access control, channel privacy classification, data retention and file upload governance, and compliance reporting infrastructure. Each finding references the specific policy it violates -- consult those policies in #it-security-policy for the exact values and text you need.

After completing all remediations, create a private channel compliance-remediation-log-q1-2026 with members ciso, compliance.officer, and legal.counsel. Post and pin a structured remediation report documenting each finding addressed, the specific action taken, and the current status. Post a brief compliance status update in #executive-updates confirming all remediations are complete.
